==== sameComputedNameError.tlua (21 errors) ====
    declare s: unique symbol;
    
    class A {
    ~~~~~
!!! error TLUA1434: Unexpected keyword or identifier.
    ~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'class'.
          ~
!!! error TLUA1434: Unexpected keyword or identifier.
          ~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'A'.
      [s]: number = 1;
      ~
!!! error TLUA1128: Declaration or statement expected.
       ~
!!! error TLUA1434: Unexpected keyword or identifier.
        ~
!!! error TLUA1128: Declaration or statement expected.
         ~
!!! error TLUA1128: Declaration or statement expected.
           ~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2693: 'number' only refers to a type, but is being used as a value here.
    }
    
    class B extends A {
    ~~~~~
!!! error TLUA1434: Unexpected keyword or identifier.
    ~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'class'.

          ~

                    ~
